description.zh: Claude Code 从按下回车到显示提示符的完整启动过程：快速路径分发 + 并行预取 + feature() 编译时消除
description.en: Complete Claude Code startup process from Enter to prompt: fast path dispatch + parallel prefetch + feature() compile-time elimination

annotation.zh: 用户执行 claude 命令，传入 --version 参数
annotation.en: User executes claude command with --version parameter

content.zh:
dev-entry.ts: 扫描缺失导入... 0 个缺失
→ 转发到 entrypoints/cli.tsx
content.en:
dev-entry.ts: Scanning missing imports... 0 missing
→ Forward to entrypoints/cli.tsx

annotation.zh: 开发入口先检查依赖完整性,通过后进入 CLI 入口
annotation.en: Dev entry first checks dependency integrity, then enters CLI entry

content.zh:
cli.tsx 快速路径检测:
  process.argv 包含 '--version'
  → 匹配快速路径 #1
  → 直接输出版本号，跳过完整加载
content.en:
cli.tsx fast path detection:
  process.argv contains '--version'
  → Match fast path #1
  → Direct version output, skip full load

annotation.zh: 快速路径优化：--version 零模块加载，毫秒级响应
annotation.en: Fast path optimization: --version zero module load, millisecond response

annotation.zh: 输出版本号后立即退出，不加载 main.tsx (785KB)
annotation.en: Output version and exit immediately, no main.tsx load (785KB)

annotation.zh: 用户执行完整启动（无快速路径参数）
annotation.en: User executes full startup (no fast path parameters)

content.zh:
cli.tsx: 无快速路径匹配
→ 动态 import('./main.tsx')
→ 加载 785KB 核心模块
content.en:
cli.tsx: No fast path match
→ Dynamic import('./main.tsx')
→ Load 785KB core modules

annotation.zh: 完整启动路径：加载 Commander.js 参数解析 + 全部子系统
annotation.en: Full startup path: load Commander.js argument parsing + all subsystems

content.zh:
main.tsx 并行预取:
  Promise.all([
    fetchMDMConfig(),      // MDM 配置
    getKeychainToken(),    // Keychain 凭证
    loadGrowthBook(),      // A/B 测试
    initAnalytics(),       // 遥测
  ])
content.en:
main.tsx parallel prefetch:
  Promise.all([
    fetchMDMConfig(),      // MDM config
    getKeychainToken(),    // Keychain credentials
    loadGrowthBook(),      // A/B testing
    initAnalytics(),       // Telemetry
  ])

annotation.zh: 关键优化：4 个异步操作并行执行，而非串行等待
annotation.en: Key optimization: 4 async operations in parallel, not serial

content.zh:
feature('internal_only') → 编译时已消除
feature('beta_tools')   → 保留并启用

→ 初始化完成，启动 REPL
content.en:
feature('internal_only') → Compile-time eliminated
feature('beta_tools')   → Preserved and enabled

→ Initialization complete, start REPL

annotation.zh: feature() 宏在构建时决定功能开关，零运行时开销
annotation.en: feature() macro determines feature toggles at build time, zero runtime overhead

content.zh: > 欢迎使用 Claude Code! 输入你的需求开始...
content.en: > Welcome to Claude Code! Enter your request to start...

annotation.zh: REPL 就绪，用户看到提示符，从按下回车到这里约 200ms
annotation.en: REPL ready, user sees prompt, from Enter to here ~200ms
